Petition For Adoption Of Proposed Amended Order On Petition To Enforce Child Support Orders Against Estate Of Victor Gaay Rosario And Estate Beneficiary.

Off Calendar Aug-04-2021 Continued To Sep-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Enforce Child Support Orders Against Estate And Against Estate Beneficiary (Hearing Not Yet Scheduled) (Placer County Department Of Child Support Services Exempt From The Payment Of Filing Fees Pursuant To Government Code Section 6103.9)
Off Calendar Jul-20-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Rutz, via ZOOM, for Placer County Department of Child Support Services.

The court at the outset queries if there are any appearances to oppose this petition. None are presented. The court then advises counsel that it intends to treat the petition as a motion under CCP 708.470. Counsel is amenable to the court's intent.

The Petition to Enforce Child Support Orders, etc., is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: B. Quesada. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-23-2021 Continued To Aug-04-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Jun-21-2021 Continued To Jul-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Apr-28-2021 Continued To Jun-23-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-17-2021 Continued To Apr-28-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-11-2021 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-11-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dawson Crawford for and with Helen Olivar (Petitioner).

The Court noted that Mr. Rosario is not present. Mr. Dawson stated that he spoke with Mr. Rosario after the last hearing, that he explained the process to him, and that Mr. Rosario indicated that he was withdrawing his objections and that he is okay with his Sister being appointed. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $300,000.00. Status on close of estate is set for January 11, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-12-2019 Continued To Jul-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Victor Rosario, Jr. in Propria Persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Mr. Rosario stated that he objects to his Sister's petition, that he wants to file a competing petition, that he needs time to get a Lawyer and that his Sister is not communicating with him. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to July 10, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
